title: Lithocardium oxyphyllum
taxonomy: Lithocardium oxyphyllum is classified under the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as legumes. The genus Lithocardium itself is not well-documented, but it is likely a part of the larger family Fabaceae. Members of the Fabaceae family are typically characterized by their coiled seed pods and ability to fix nitrogen from the atmosphere. The classification of Lithocardium oxyphyllum is not widely recognized or documented in mainstream botanical sources. Further research is needed to confirm its classification within the plant kingdom.
